data.text/markdown: Arter av nasjonal forvaltningsinteresse

Mark that the Hønsehauk test is failing. That is because the species ID between the enriched data freiria das nt mhing. The milio data is not updated. So you first have to join on scientific name ID and then you have to join on the name and make some sort of check that if this area are still null values or no matches and that this is like you have to work it out somehow.

Husk å strip to lowercase før du gjør en match/join på navnet
